description_long: This sculpture depicts a dramatic scene with two human figures, one standing with wings and the other kneeling, both positioned atop a rugged, rocky base. The standing figure appears to be an angel, with detailed wings and flowing garments, extending an object or gesture toward the kneeling figure. The kneeling figure is robed and reaches upward, suggesting a moment of offering or supplication. The rocky base is irregular and textured, giving the impression of a natural outcrop or elevated terrain. The entire piece is rendered in a dark, bronze-like material with a slightly glossy finish. The figures are intricately detailed, with attention to facial features, drapery, and anatomical form.
description: A bronze-like sculpture of an angelic figure interacting with a kneeling person atop a rugged, rocky base, rendered with detailed drapery and expressive poses.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angelic figure standing atop the rocky base, facing forward with wings spread and arms extended.
description_view_1: Side view revealing both the angel and the kneeling figure, highlighting the interaction and the layered rocky terrain.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the angel, with detailed wings and the rugged texture of the rock base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the kneeling figure reaching toward the angel, with the rocky base extending outward.
attribute_subject_matter: angelic figure and kneeling human on rocky base
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
